allow: Bash(.venv/bin/python -c "from soundsplit import split, SplitResult, StemPaths; from soundsplit.extractors import detect_key, detect_tempo, separate_stems, transcribe_midi; print\('All imports OK'\)")

Bash(.venv/bin/python -c "
from soundsplit import split

result = split\(
    '/tmp/test_song.wav',
    output_dir='/tmp/test_out',
    stems=False,        # skip demucs for now \(slow + model download\)
    midi=False,         # skip basic-pitch for now
    per_stem_midi=False,
    beat_grid=True,
    key=True,
\)

print\(\)
print\(f'BPM:          {result.bpm}'\)
print\(f'Time sig:     {result.time_signature}'\)
print\(f'Key:          {result.key}'\)
print\(f'Duration:     {result.duration_s:.1f}s'\)
print\(f'Beat count:   {len\(result.beat_times\)}'\)
print\(f'Downbeats:    {len\(result.downbeat_times\)}'\)

import json
meta = json.loads\(\(result.output_dir / \\"metadata.json\\"\).read_text\(\)\)
print\(f'metadata.json written: {list\(meta.keys\(\)\)}'\)
beat_json = result.output_dir / 'beat_grid.json'
print\(f'beat_grid.json written: {beat_json.exists\(\)}'\)
")
